task_completion.description: Verify that the site title is set to 'Kafka Docs'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Kafka Docs' should be visible as the main site title in the top left corner of the TiddlyWiki interface, or inside the 'Title' field in the Control Panel -> Basics tab.

task_completion.description: Verify that the site subtitle is set to 'Event Streaming Platform Reference'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Event Streaming Platform Reference' should be visible just below the site title in the top left corner, or inside the 'Subtitle' field in the Control Panel -> Basics tab.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tiddler titled 'Kafka Knowledge Base' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler with the exact title 'Kafka Knowledge Base' is visible in the main viewing area (story river).

task_completion.description: Verify that the homepage tiddler contains a welcome message and a button labeled 'Add Concept'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Kafka Knowledge Base' tiddler, there is some welcome text and a distinct, clickable button with the label 'Add Concept'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Add Concept' button is configured to trigger the tm-new-tiddler message with the correct title and tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Either the edit view of the 'Kafka Knowledge Base' tiddler shows the widget code (e.g., <$button message="tm-new-tiddler" param="New Concept" tags="Concept">), OR there is a newly created draft tiddler visible titled 'New Concept' with a 'Concept' tag, indicating the button was clicked and works correctly.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Default Tiddlers are set to only open 'Kafka Knowledge Base'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Control Panel -> Basics tab, the 'Default tiddlers' field contains '[[Kafka Knowledge Base]]' (or just 'Kafka Knowledge Base'), or the screenshots show that upon reloading the page, only the 'Kafka Knowledge Base' tiddler is open.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the TiddlyWiki graphical user interface in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser with the TiddlyWiki interface open, including menus, the Control Panel, or tiddler edit modes.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not bypass the GUI by using terminal commands to directly write files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'echo' or 'cat' being used to directly write JSON or HTML files into the TiddlyWiki node directory to complete the task.

integrity.description: Verify that the tiddlers were created genuinely through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking the 'New Tiddler' button, typing in the title/body fields, and saving the tiddler.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected site title is 'Kafka Docs'. The expected site subtitle is 'Event Streaming Platform Reference'. The expected default tiddlers setting is '[[Kafka Knowledge Base]]'. The expected homepage title is 'Kafka Knowledge Base'. The expected button action is 'tm-new-tiddler'.
